name: True Owner Substitution for Unclaimed Cash

eligibility.description: Requires the true owner of cash (exceeding $10,000) to come forward, acknowledge ownership, and be readily identifiable by the Secretary after an initial assessment against the possessor.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows the actual owner of cash to be substituted for the possessor in a jeopardy assessment, potentially reducing the tax rate from the highest individual rate to the owner's actual effective rate.
